productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Reversible Bling Red Shirts
description: CompositionReversible shirt in red and navy blue with blue stripes on the red side and purple stripes on the reverse, made of a cotton blend fabric, with a tipped collar, front buttoned placket, full length sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careWash dark colours separatelyHand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printStripes that add immense style to your casual look is what indigo nation brings into your life. But what makes this shirt even better is that you can wear it inside out or outside in and change your colour code to suit the occasion. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys and black footwear for stylish formal and casual looks.Model statisticsThe model wears size 40 in shirtsHeight: 6; Shoulders: 18
